ops.body: Residual not fixed here: plugin/skills/using-cc-notes/references/cli-reference.md's intro (lines 3-6) omits "investigation" from both the noun enumeration and the --json sentence. Left alone deliberately — a concurrent session has uncommitted edits to that exact sentence (documenting the new global --repo flag); the fix should ride with their commit or a follow-up to avoid a shared-working-copy conflict. Also worth a look: internal/cli/anchored_uniform_test.go pins note/doc/log/runbook only — investigation has the same anchor surface and could join the uniformity test.
